title: Delicate Flaky Korean Citrus Pancakes
description: These indulgent pancakes feature a delicate flaky texture and a burst of citrus flavor, making them a perfect treat for any time of day. They are made with self-raising flour and are ovo-vegetarian-friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the self-raising flour, granulated sugar, and shio-cure.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, yogurt, orange zest, and orange juice.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Add the melted butter and salt, and stir until the batter is smooth.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
